description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-05-15 session — Relief rally Day 2, Nifty +1.18% to 23,689.60, Brent cooled to $105.49, BankNifty reclaimed 54,000+

market_regime.label: RELIEF_RALLY_DAY2_BRENT_COOLING
market_regime.key_risk: Nifty surged +1.18% on Brent cooling ($108.10→$105.49) and Trump-Xi summit optimism. BankNifty reclaimed 54,000+ (+1.26%). Broad-based buying. Relief rally Day 1 was strong — Day 2 follow-through is the key question. Brent below $106 is the floor for continued rally.
market_regime.vix_level: Elevated but declining on relief rally
market_regime.fii_stance: Likely net sellers but reduced intensity given crude cooling
market_regime.dii_stance: Continued buying — DII flows provided floor during selloff and now participate in rally

key_sectors_today.note: Broad-based rally but IT continued to lag. Banking recovery key signal.

key_drivers: Nifty surged +1.18% to 23,689.60 with strong breadth — momentum carries overnight positive bias.
Brent crude cooled to $105.49 from $108.10 — if US session confirms crude softening, gap-up extends.
BankNifty reclaimed 54,000+ (+1.26%) — banking short-covering momentum should carry into open.
Trump-Xi summit Day 2 headlines — any concrete trade/diplomacy announcement amplifies gap-up.
Friday effect: some profit-taking risk after +1.18% Thursday rally, may cap gap-up at +0.2-0.3%.
risks: UPSIDE: Trump-Xi concrete deal announcement or Iran diplomacy breakthrough overnight → gap-up +0.5-0.8%.
DOWNSIDE: Brent reversal overnight (>$107) or Trump-Xi summit failure → flat to slight gap-down.
DATA: US CPI or Fed commentary could shift global risk appetite.

session_direction.key_assumption: Day 2 of relief rally. Nifty opened +0.18% at 23731. Brent rebounded to $106.89 (+1.11%) overnight — partial headwind but still below $108 panic levels. US markets at record highs (S&P 7501, Dow 50063) supportive. IT sector showing buying (Infosys, TCS top gainers). Friday profit-taking risk after +1.18% Thursday rally. BankNifty above 54000 supportive. Key level: 23800 breakout triggers move to 23900+; failure means consolidation in 23650-23800 range.
session_direction.brent_forecast: $105-108 range. Central $107. Rebounded from $105.49 to $106.89. Hormuz/Iran risk persists.

scenarios.name: FOLLOW_THROUGH_RALLY (40%)
scenarios.description: Nifty breaks 23800, IT buying continues, BankNifty holds 54000+. Close 23800-23900 (+0.3-0.6%).

scenarios.name: CHOPPY_CONSOLIDATION (30%)
scenarios.description: Brent rebound to $107 caps gains. Friday profit-taking. Nifty oscillates 23650-23800. Close flat to +0.2%.

scenarios.name: PROFIT_TAKING_DIP (20%)
scenarios.description: Friday selloff intensifies, Brent pushes toward $108. Nifty retests 23600-23650. Close -0.1 to -0.3%.

scenarios.name: BREAKOUT_RALLY (10%)
scenarios.description: Trump-Xi concrete deal or Iran breakthrough. Nifty breaks 23900 toward 24000+. Close +0.7-1.0%.

ceasefire_binary_matrix.note: Trump REJECTED Iran proposal — peace_deal_advancing collapsed from 0.35 → 0.10. Escalation upgraded from 0.30 → 0.60 on IRGC frigate incident + Brent spike to $115 + Trump explicit rejection. Stalemate at 0.30 (Trump did pivot to "very positive discussions" by May 4 — diplomacy not fully dead).
